rule_text: Tender Notice (NIT) for AP works up to Rs.50 lakh must be published in District editions of two Telugu dailies with the largest circulation; for works above Rs.50 lakh, in one Telugu daily and one English daily with the largest State-level circulation.
verification_method: Check NIT publication record: <=Rs.50L → 2 Telugu district editions; >Rs.50L → 1 Telugu + 1 English state-level. NIT format must follow BoCE-prescribed minimum-cost template.

rule_text: Tender schedule (BOQ) in AP works must show department-computed item rates AND total contract value; bidder must NOT quote item-wise but must indicate willingness as a single tender percentage (excess/equal/less than the estimated value).
verification_method: Check BOQ format: dept rates shown + total estimate shown + bidder quotes single 'percentage above/below' (not item-wise)

rule_text: EMD for AP works tender documents is collected in two slabs: 1% of estimated contract value paid at issue of tender documents to discourage non-serious bidders; balance 1.5% paid by successful bidder at agreement-signing — total 2.5% EMD.
verification_method: Check tender BDS specifies 1% EMD at document issue + 1.5% at agreement; reject if 0%/single-stage/different-percentage

rule_text: Tender schedules for AP works must NOT be issuable on the last date of submission — issuance must close on a date prior; once a contractor purchases a tender schedule he cannot return it; if he then fails to submit a tender, his EMD shall be forfeited (cash or BG or both).
verification_method: Check tender NIT timeline: tender_doc_issue_close_date < bid_submission_close_date; check SCC contains EMD-forfeiture clause for non-submission
